subject: [SDNC] Fix indent level for nodeSelector and affinity
commit_message:
[SDNC] Fix indent level for nodeSelector and affinity

When nodeSelector was given by values or override.yaml, helm deploy
was failed due to wrong indentation in helm charts.

This change fixed indentation level for nodeSelector and affinity
in pod spec.

Issue-ID: SDNC-1565
Signed-off-by: Satoshi Fujii <fujii-satoshi@jp.fujitsu.com>
Change-Id: Ie5446928e3f32d9333c04245fc0d2c0f98b3b4e7

Patch Set 1:

(10 comments)

Hi Satoshi,
thanks for the proposal, it's much appreciated to see this kind of merge request.

I've got only editorial comments, mainly using 'nindent' instead of 'indent' in order to have a code more elegant IMHO

also {{- end -}} between the two makes side effets, that's why I propose to use {{- end }} instead.

When these minor changes are done, I guess we'll be ready for merge!
Uploaded patch set 2.
